EMAIL 1  (1 hour delay)SUBJECT: Re: your orderFROM: Grant Cardone



Hey ____



First of all, I’m very excited and appreciative that you’re getting started with the 10X Income System.  Me and my team are behind you all the way to make sure you get a MASSIVE ROI (return on investment).And remember, this is an investment.  It’s an investment into yourself, an investment for your financial future and an investment to improve the life of those you love.Oh, and it’s a tax write off too :)So anyway, let’s go ahead and handle our unfinished business.  When you click below and complete your order you’ll get immediate access to all your training.  You’ll also be registered for my virtual coaching program, which you can start at your convenience...Go here to finish what you started »

Remember, when you step up and get this going, you will never be alone again.  You’ll have me, my entire team and the entire 10X community behind you every step of the way.So let’s quit talking, and let’s make it happen!See you on the inside,Grant CardoneP.S. I am pulling down all the bonuses VERY soon.  Go here and get started now so you don’t miss out.









EMAIL 2  (4 hours later)

SUBJECT: 💸 Get started for $0 downFROM: Grant Cardone



Hey [first name]Our support has been getting bombarded by people who want to get started with the 10X Income System but don’t have the financial capability to do so.

 

STRAIGHT TALK: If the low start-up cost is more than you can swing, even on a credit card, then you definitely need this.

 

Look, I totally understand that times are tough out there right now.  I also understand that you probably haven’t had somebody like me to help you get your money right.

 

Let’s change that.

 

If you’re serious and you’re willing to let me push you to get results, then I’ve got a way you can get started with our 12 month program for $0 down...

 

STEP #1 - Go here to get program details

 

STEP #2 - Click the button and add to cart

 

STEP #3 - Choose to pay with Paypal

 

STEP #4 - Click Order Now and then choose Paypal credit

 

STEP #5 - Follow the instructions

 

There is also a very important step #6 as well…

 

Step the hell up and make sure this is the best damn investment you’ve ever made in your life!

 

I’m giving you everything you need, but you’ve got to believe you can do it.

 

I know you can, now it’s time to find out if you believe you can too…

 

Go here to apply to get started with $0 down »

 

See you in the member’s area.

 

Grant Cardone

10X
